text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the middle of summer and camp season has
arrived!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun blazes over the campsite. Next to it, at
the beach...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Onward, my Opera O opera troupe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O's commands echo through the air.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am no longer by my lonesome, Trainer. I have
gained capable followers from the members of my
generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are Ayabe and Doto! These two vanguards
will lead our advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this camp shall serve as the stage for the
preliminary clash of generations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: See? Lo, over yonder!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
S-Spe, cut that ooout... Stop splashing me with
water.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I don't think so, Grass. Now stand still,
please. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and Special Week, heroes of the
older generation, are here at this same camp.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are fierce, certainly—powerful foes, most
definitely. But we will not fall!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Ayabe and Doto! Arm yourselves with
buckets of water that we may douse those two till
they're drenched!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm... Ayabe? Doto? Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't see them anywhere, which means...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What?! They've withdrawn themselves to the
camping quarters?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though, Doto did mention she felt uncomfortable
in swimming attire...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And Ayabe never responded to my messages. I
assumed she was so adamant about coming that
she wanted to reserve her enthusiasm till we met.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well then... It would appear we're shorthanded.
The disadvantage is clear. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is always hope! The most elite of elites is
here beside me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, onward! Onward, Trainer! You are the last
piece afforded to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall infiltrate and mercilessly douse them
with sea water whilst chanting, "Water the
flowers! Water the Grass!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Agh, Trainer?! Where do you think you are off
to?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get out of there as fast as my legs can carry me.
Being at Opera O's mercy all summer could be the
death of me.
